entry.title: My telegram channel
entry.content:
Good afternoon everybody
this is Anson
I came here is for your guys
I set up my EN telegram channel 1 month ago
so if you want to join our telegram channel
Please tap this link
this channel is all of the channel in one channel
in this channel we have: my Chinese channel, my English channel
if you join this channel please go to the top message and choose the channel that suitable to you

In the end

entry.title: Anson's First Post!!!
entry.content:
Hello Everyone This is Anson

A student from China and I always welcome you come here and talk to me, but if you are not English speaker, you can chose to visit my Chinese home page.
But I give English speaker another platform based on telegram join and this is my first blog, if have any wrong from my website, welcome you email me in about page
